div.p: Raw bytes from kernel Size: 0 → 16384 bytes Accumulated across N read() calls
Arena lifetime = connection lifetime Pointers valid until keep-alive reset (memset on state transition)

headers[0].name → "Host" headers[0].value → "localhost" headers[1].name → "Content-Length" headers[1].value → "42" headers[2].name → "Connection" headers[2].value → "close" … (null-terminated strings, packed) Used: 0 → 8192 bytes
